description: Controlled-overlap DummyParams sampler for Task 25. Candidate pools remain params-only until labels are acquired.

modified_constraints.C1: outer_span > wall_thickness + eps_access and inner cavity distance remains positive

notes: Caps are initial implementation settings, not thesis results.
The sampler records original margins and actual voxel/SDF labels decide whether visible overlap exists.
If calibration shows too many absurd or non-informative samples, supersede this config rather than silently changing it.
